form.formComment: Last start 9th of 14 at Riccarton Park on March 21 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Iron Hawk carrying 60.5kg at $10.90. The race before that won by 0.6 len at Wingatui February 28 over 1400m in soft going defeating Cherryville carrying 58kg at $3.50. Best form stacks up nicely so worth another chance.

form.formComment: At the latest run 13th of 15 at Riccarton Park in the G3 South Island Thoroughbred Breeders? Stakes on March 21 over 1600m, 17 len behind Inflamed with 55kg at $26.30. Worth forgiving and can turn things around.
